PreCommit.command: bash -c 'MSG=$(git rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null)/COMMIT_EDITMSG; if [ -f "$MSG" ]; then if ! head -1 "$MSG" | grep -qE "^(feat|fix|docs|refactor|chore|test|ci|perf|style|build)(\(.+\))?!?: .+"; then echo "⚠️  Commit message does not follow Conventional Commits format"; echo "   Expected: <type>: <description>"; echo "   Types: feat, fix, docs, refactor, chore, test, ci, perf, style, build"; fi; fi'
